sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Anthologia Graeca</hi> (Names of epigrammatists, where found in codd., are added in brackets.) <title_ TEIform="title">Anthologia Palatina, Planudea,</title_> ed.
